title: HESP CORE - Economic shocks and hardship
description: Income shocks, job loss, unexpected expenses, displacement, payment hardship, food-related hardship, emergency capacity, and coping strategies.

income_drop_12m.title: Household income fell substantially in past 12 months

income_drop_percent.title: Approximate percentage decline in household income
income_drop_percent.x-universe: Households reporting a substantial income decline.

household_job_loss_12m.title: Any household adult lost a job involuntarily in past 12 months

major_unplanned_expense_12m.title: Household had a major unplanned expense in past 12 months

major_unplanned_expense_amount.title: Largest unplanned expense amount
major_unplanned_expense_amount.x-universe: Households reporting a major unplanned expense.

disaster_displacement_12m.title: Household displaced by a natural disaster or infrastructure failure in past 12 months

disaster_displacement_days.title: Days displaced from home
disaster_displacement_days.x-universe: Households displaced by a disaster or infrastructure failure.

utility_shutoff_12m.title: Utility service disconnected for nonpayment in past 12 months

missed_housing_payment_12m.title: Missed or paid late a rent or mortgage payment in past 12 months
missed_housing_payment_12m.x-universe: Households with a cash rent or mortgage payment.

missed_debt_payment_12m.title: Missed or paid late a nonhousing debt payment in past 12 months

food_insecurity_12m.title: Household reduced food quantity or skipped meals because of cost in past 12 months

oneOf.title: Credit paid in full at next statement
Borrow, sell assets, or use high-cost credit
Could not fully cover the expense

emergency_expense_ability.title: How household would cover a moderate emergency expense

emergency_savings_months.title: Months of essential expenses covered by liquid savings

coping_any.title: Used any coping strategy for a financial shock in past 12 months

coping_used_savings.title: Used savings to cope with a shock
coping_used_savings.x-universe: Households using at least one coping strategy.

coping_borrowed_family.title: Borrowed from family or friends to cope with a shock
coping_borrowed_family.x-universe: Households using at least one coping strategy.

coping_used_credit.title: Used credit or a loan to cope with a shock
coping_used_credit.x-universe: Households using at least one coping strategy.

coping_sold_assets.title: Sold or pawned assets to cope with a shock
coping_sold_assets.x-universe: Households using at least one coping strategy.

coping_skipped_bills.title: Delayed or skipped bills to cope with a shock
coping_skipped_bills.x-universe: Households using at least one coping strategy.

primary_shock_type.title: Most consequential financial shock
primary_shock_type.x-universe: Households reporting at least one major shock.

largest_shock_amount.title: Estimated financial magnitude of most consequential shock
largest_shock_amount.x-universe: Households reporting at least one major shock.

financial_stress_frequency.title: Frequency of worry about meeting regular expenses
